lanes.title: Universal Scatter System
lanes.summary: Surface sampling, density masks, instance variation, and art-directable scatter before Unreal PCG takes over at scale.

steps.name: Mesh input + normals
steps.detail: Capture base terrain or trim mesh; align normals for stable instance rotation.

steps.name: Density mask
steps.detail: Vertex color, attribute map, or curve falloff drives where instances may spawn.

steps.name: Instance on points
steps.detail: Collection instances with scale/rotation randomization and clump controls.

steps.name: Realize + decimate
steps.detail: Optional realize for hero clusters; keep instances for export when possible.

steps.name: Export handoff
steps.detail: FBX/OBJ with applied scale, origin at base, material slots named for Unreal.

lanes.unreal_parallel: PCG scatter volumes on L_WP_* pillars

lanes.title: Procedural Rock Generator
lanes.summary: Silhouette variants, strata masks, noise displacement, and LOD-friendly decimation for grotto and shrine dressing.

steps.name: Base primitive
steps.detail: Ico-sphere or displaced cube as rock core silhouette.

steps.name: Strata + cracks
steps.detail: Layered noise masks carve sediment bands and fracture lines.

steps.name: Displacement stack
steps.detail: Vector displacement with clamped amplitude for stylized reads.

steps.name: LOD variants
steps.detail: Decimate modifier outputs for near/mid/far export set.

steps.name: Portfolio capture
steps.detail: Beauty + wireframe + graph plate for geometry-nodes.html.

lanes.title: Asset Pipeline Handoff
lanes.summary: Scale, transforms, origins, UVs, material slots, and validation checklist before anything hits ZenForestTest or WP pillars.

steps.name: Apply transforms
steps.detail: 1 BU = 1 cm convention; apply scale/rotation before export.

steps.name: Origin + pivot
steps.detail: Ground pivot for props; center pivot for scatter instances.

steps.name: Material slots
steps.detail: Slot names match Unreal MI assignment plan.

steps.name: FBX export
steps.detail: Smoothing groups, tangents, no animation unless needed.

steps.name: UE validation
steps.detail: Import log, collision, Nanite decision, portfolio render slot.

lanes.title: Cosmic Orrery Math Kit
lanes.summary: Parametric torus knots, epitrochoid rings, armillary scaffolding, and Kepler orbits baked to StaticMesh assets for L_WP_CosmicOrrery.

steps.name: DynamicMesh primitives
steps.detail: GeometryScript_Primitives → tube along sampled curves.

steps.name: Curve sampling
steps.detail: Torus knot (2,3), epitrochoid, Kepler ellipse sweeps.

steps.name: Normals + merge
steps.detail: recompute_normals → single mesh per structure.

steps.name: Bake to asset
steps.detail: create_new_static_mesh_asset_from_mesh + save.

steps.name: PCG anchor
steps.detail: Fibonacci sphere anchors feed PCG_Cosmic_OrbitScatter.

lanes.title: Math Structures Library
lanes.summary: Polyhedral mounts, Möbius ribbons, Lissajous rails, gyroid patches — portfolio-safe mathematical meshes across pillars.

steps.name: Tier pick
steps.detail: Polyhedral planet cores, curves/ribbons, minimal surfaces, phyllotaxis anchors.

steps.name: Parametric bake
steps.detail: _bake_triangle_mesh or primitive append pipeline.

steps.name: Audit manifest
steps.detail: geometryscript_meshes.json tracks path, tris, status.

steps.name: Material instance
steps.detail: MI_Show_CelestialNebula or cosmic SDF on preview spheres.

steps.name: NightShift capture
steps.detail: Instance preview PNG → nightshift intake.

lanes.title: WP Pillar PCG Volumes
lanes.summary: Four owned L_WP levels with PCG volumes respawned — ISM regen still manual in-editor after MeshTerrain block-in.

steps.name: Pillar scaffold
steps.detail: L_WP_SakuraDream, SpaceCathedral, BaroqueGrotto, CosmicOrrery saved.

steps.name: Volume assign
steps.detail: MeadowBloom, EscherRelativityRoom, RockScatter+WallMoss, OrbitScatter.

steps.name: ISM regen
steps.detail: Regenerate until ISM count > 0 on hero camera.

steps.name: Route proof
steps.detail: ZEN_SHRINE_AXIS heatmap + exclusion zones.

steps.name: Capture
steps.detail: pcg_l_wp_* plates into portfolio_package.json.
